title: Dekton Geckoslide 16pc Furniture Pads 30mm -Non-Slip Protective Pads| Prevents Scratches, Noise| Ideal for Furniture Legs & Floors| Self-Adhesive| Protects All Surfaces| Perfect for Home & Office Use
features: Safeguard your floors and furniture with Dekton Geckoslide Furniture Pads. Designed to prevent scratches, scuffs, and dents, these pads are ideal for use on various surfaces, including hardwood, tile, laminate, and vinyl. The self-adhesive backing ensures a secure fit, protecting your surfaces from damage and extending their lifespan.

Non-Slip Design: Equipped with a specialized non-slip material, these furniture pads provide stability and grip, reducing the risk of accidental slips or movement. Perfect for keeping chairs, tables, and other furniture pieces in place, they help maintain a tidy and organized space while preventing unwanted noise and shifting.

Noise Reduction: Enjoy a quieter environment with these noise-reducing pads. The cushioned design absorbs impact and vibration, minimizing the sound of furniture movement. Ideal for use in homes, offices, and any space where a peaceful atmosphere is desired, these pads contribute to a more comfortable and noise-free setting.

Durable and Long-Lasting: Made from high-quality materials, these furniture pads are built to withstand everyday use and offer long-lasting protection. The durable construction ensures that the pads remain effective even with frequent movement and pressure, making them a reliable choice for both home and office environments.

Perfect for Home and Office Use: Whether you're protecting the floors in your living room, office, or any other space, Dekton Geckoslide Furniture Pads are a practical solution. Their discreet design blends seamlessly with various furniture styles and colors, offering both functional and aesthetic benefits for a wide range of settings.
description: The Dekton Geckoslide 16pc Furniture Pads are an essential addition to any home or office, designed to provide superior protection and convenience. Each pad measures 30mm in diameter, making them ideal for use on furniture legs and floors. Crafted from high-quality materials, these non-slip protective pads effectively prevent scratches, dents, and noise, ensuring your surfaces remain pristine. The self-adhesive backing allows for easy application, sticking firmly to furniture legs and various types of floors without leaving any residue or damaging the surface upon removal. These versatile pads are perfect for a wide range of furniture, including chairs, tables, and cabinets, providing a smooth glide that reduces friction and noise when moving or adjusting furniture. The pads are designed to protect all surfaces, from hardwood and laminate to tiles and vinyl, making them a practical solution for any environment. By reducing the impact of furniture movements, the Geckoslide pads also help to prolong the life of your flooring and prevent costly repairs. Whether you're looking to preserve the finish of your hardwood floors, keep your tiles scratch-free, or simply reduce the noise caused by moving furniture, the Dekton Geckoslide pads offer a reliable and efficient solution. Their durability ensures they withstand regular use while maintaining their protective properties, making them an ideal choice for both residential and commercial settings.
